rdf:Description.dc:description: Two-panel schematic of the suction-bucket bearing-capacity formulation (manuscript submitted Fig 9): (a) intact condition with effective embedment L and q_ult = gamma L N_q + 0.4 gamma R N_gamma; (b) scoured condition with effective embedment L-S and updated formula. B&W-safe hatches differentiate effective-capacity zone from the lost-support zone.
